excerpt:

posts.author: LS0107 (L)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
Connected Board columns and Mirror - are they available in Forms? I found a thread from Jan 24 where Monday.com representative says it will be available very soon. I’m struggling to get the column in Forms, am I doing something wrong or the feature is still unavailable?
Is there any workaround please?
I need to a dropdown list to refer to a existing board with ~900-1000 lines of Supplier codes. Once supplier code is chosen, Supplier name is autofilled based on the code chosen. In the table itself I used connected board and mirror columns, but wasn’t able to reflect this in Forms.
Thanks!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’s in Beta, my account has it currently, but we ‘activated’ it a long time ago.
